artPrompt: A stern human bureaucrat in a drab municipal suit looms behind an elevated zoning-board bench, one finger pressed to a cold cyan-lit map model of the town, his shadow falling across the petitioners below. Towering filing cabinets and blank pinned plans recede into fluorescent haze behind him. Imposing low film-still angle conveying petty almighty authority, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Zoning Board Chairman
text: Creatures your opponents control enter the battlefield tapped. (They must clear inspection before opening to the public.)
flavorText: He once rezoned a goblin warren as wetlands purely out of spite.
